steps.title: Compare both extinction risks
steps.content: The student wants a comparison of extinction risk. The notes say C. olivacea faces a high risk, while C. furcatus faces little risk of becoming extinct in the near future.

steps.title: Keep only relevant facts
steps.content: Choice B reverses the risks. Choice C says both risks were evaluated but does not compare the risk levels. Choice D gives facts about only one species. The remaining choice directly compares the two species' extinction risks. The answer is A.
